ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the region belongs to */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_types" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury type */,
  "injury_name" TEXT /* Name of the injury type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury subtype */,
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injury type the subtype belongs to */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the injury subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_subtypes_injury_id FOREIGN KEY ("injury_id") REFERENCES injury_types ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_mechanisms" (
  "mechanism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanism of injury */,
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injury type the mechanism belongs to */,
  "mechanism_name" TEXT /* Name of the mechanism of injury */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mechanism of injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_mechanisms_injury_id FOREIGN KEY ("injury_id") REFERENCES injury_types ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mechanism_subtypes" (
  "mechanism_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanism subtype */,
  "mechanism_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mechanism the subtype belongs to */,
  "mechanism_subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the mechanism subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mechanism subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanism_subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mechanism_subtypes_mechanism_id FOREIGN KEY ("mechanism_id") REFERENCES injury_mechanisms ("mechanism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury data entry */,
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injury type the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country the data belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region the data belongs to */,
  "num_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries for the given year */,
  "num_fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities for the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_data_injury_id FOREIGN KEY ("injury_id") REFERENCES injury_types ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the injury severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injury data the demographic information belongs to */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the injured individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the injured individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the injured individual */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Severity of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_ethnicity FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES injury_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injury data the quality information belongs to */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injury data that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES injury_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_name FOREIGN KEY ("report_name") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report the data belongs to */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injury data the report data belongs to */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES injury_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_visualization_type FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_type") REFERENCES visualization_types ("visualization_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_data" (
  "visualization_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization data entry */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visualization the data belongs to */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injury data the visualization data belongs to */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the visualization data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES injury_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_data_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report the comment belongs to */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visualization the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_types" (
  "visualization_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization type */,
  "visualization_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_type_id")
)
